Key item features
Durable Material: Crafted from a blend of 67% Cotton, 32% Polyester, and 1% Spandex for comfort and flexibility.
Easy Care: These jeans are machine washable for convenient and simple maintenance.
Flattering Fit: Features a high-rise waist and a stylish flare leg design, with a 33.5-inch inseam.
Secure Closure: Equipped with a button closure and a reliable zip fly for a secure fit.
Practical Pockets: Includes five functional pockets to conveniently store essential items.
Distinctive Details: Showcases distressing at the hem, waist, and back pocket on light wash, along with an SV stitched signature logo, belt loops, topstitching, rose gold-tone trim, and an evil eye leather-like logo patch at the back waist.
Comfortable Stretch: The stretch denim material gently hugs the hips and waist, providing comfort and freedom of movement.

Durable Material: Crafted from a blend of 67% Cotton, 32% Polyester, and 1% Spandex for comfort and flexibility.

Durable Material: Crafted from a blend of 67% Cotton, 32% Polyester, and 1% Spandex for comfort and flexibility.
Easy Care: These jeans are machine washable for convenient and simple maintenance.

Comfortable Stretch: The stretch denim material gently hugs the hips and waist, providing comfort and freedom of movement.

Key item features
Durable Material: Crafted from a blend of 67% Cotton, 32% Polyester, and 1% Spandex for comfort and flexibility.
Easy Care: These jeans are machine washable for convenient and simple maintenance.
Flattering Fit: Features a high-rise waist and a stylish flare leg design, with a 33.5-inch inseam.
Secure Closure: Equipped with a button closure and a reliable zip fly for a secure fit.
Practical Pockets: Includes five functional pockets to conveniently store essential items.
Distinctive Details: Showcases distressing at the hem, waist, and back pocket on light wash, along with an SV stitched signature logo, belt loops, topstitching, rose gold-tone trim, and an evil eye leather-like logo patch at the back waist.
Comfortable Stretch: The stretch denim material gently hugs the hips and waist, providing comfort and freedom of movement.
